name: Roma & Ishan
text: Selling my first home wasn't just a real estate transaction—it was an emotional, sometimes overwhelming experience filled with unexpected turns. I didn't fully grasp how much goes into the process until I lived it: constant coordination, buyer negotiations, legal hurdles, shifting timelines, and so many moving parts behind the scenes. Pooja handled all of it with an incredible mix of professionalism, tenacity, and care. She was in the details, always a step ahead—whether it was chasing down documents, managing communication between parties, or simply making sure I felt supported during the tough moments. She knew when to push, when to listen, and when to step in and steer things back on course. What made it even more special is that she didn't just see it as a sale—she understood the emotional weight of letting go of a first home. She brought not just skill, but heart, and made a difficult process feel manageable and meaningful. I'm grateful for her guidance, her persistence, and her ability to make something so complex feel personal and human. If this is what she brings to her friends, I can only imagine the dedication she brings to all her clients.
